title: Kale Potato Sausage Soup
description: A hearty soup of crumbled Italian sausage, potatoes, and kale in a lightly creamy broth.

items: Salt and black pepper to taste (about 1 teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon black pepper)
1 lb small new potatoes or red potatoes, diced
6 cups chicken broth (or water and chicken bouillon)
1 bunch of kale, washed and chopped

instructions: In a deep pot, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the sausage. Cook for 5 minutes, until brown, stirring frequently to crumble it while it cooks.
Add the onion and garlic, stir to combine. Add the oregano, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper. Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the chicken stock and bring the soup to a boil. Add the potatoes. Cook for 10-15 minutes, until the potatoes are fully cooked.
Add the kale and cook for 2 more minutes, then add the cream. Stir.
Add more salt and pepper if needed.
